scenarios.description: Valid power-of-2 length=1 sets scores and updates height to 0 (length%1==0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: using real array of length 1; no mocks needed
scenarios.expectedResult: scores array reference updated to provided array; height == 0

scenarios.description: Valid power-of-2 length=8 sets scores and updates height to 3
scenarios.precondition: using real array of length 8; no mocks needed
scenarios.expectedResult: scores array reference updated to provided array; height == 3

scenarios.description: Invalid non-power-of-2 length=3 rejects update and retains original scores (length%1!=0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: redirect System.out to ByteArrayOutputStream to capture printed message; stub for PrintStream
scenarios.expectedResult: scores remains unchanged from initial state; height unchanged; printed output contains "must be a power of 2"
pseudocode: assert out.toString().contains("must be a power of 2");

scenarios.description: Invalid non-power-of-2 length=5 rejects update and retains original scores
scenarios.precondition: redirect System.out to ByteArrayOutputStream to capture printed message; stub for PrintStream
scenarios.expectedResult: scores remains unchanged; height unchanged; printed output contains "must be a power of 2"
pseudocode: assert out.toString().contains("must be a power of 2");

scenarios.description: Invalid zero-length array rejects update and retains original scores
scenarios.precondition: redirect System.out to ByteArrayOutputStream to capture printed message; stub for PrintStream
scenarios.expectedResult: scores remains unchanged; height unchanged; printed output contains "must be a power of 2"
pseudocode: assert out.toString().contains("must be a power of 2");
